seoTitle: Clear All Responses in Microsoft Forms Without Deleting It
metaDescription: Wipe out old submission data in Microsoft Forms while keeping your question layout, sharing link, and QR code fully intact.
intro: Resetting a Microsoft Forms survey between collection cycles doesn't require rebuilding it from scratch. Since Forms keeps your question design separate from participant data, you can flush out old responses entirely while preserving your structure and distribution links.

steps.heading: Open the Responses tab
steps.body: Switch from your quiz or survey editor into the Responses tab to view your current submission count.

steps.heading: Back up before deleting
steps.body: Click Open in Excel to download a copy of your existing data before wiping it out.

steps.heading: Open the delete option
steps.body: Click the three-dot More Options icon next to the Excel export link and select Delete all responses.

steps.heading: Confirm the irreversible action
steps.body: Read the warning prompt carefully, then click the red Delete button to authorize the database wipe.

steps.heading: Verify the reset
steps.body: Check that your analytics charts and response counters have dropped to zero, and confirm your question structure remains completely intact.

faq.question: Does clearing responses delete my questions too?
faq.answer: No, deleting responses only removes participant data — your form's questions and design stay untouched.

faq.question: Can I undo a response deletion?
faq.answer: No, this action is irreversible, so back up your data to Excel before proceeding.

faq.question: Will my sharing link still work after clearing responses?
faq.answer: Yes, your existing shortened URL and QR code remain active for the next collection wave.

faq.question: Do the analytics charts reset automatically?
faq.answer: Yes, your dashboard's overview charts and word clouds return to zero immediately after the wipe.
